description: Markdown Support in BigInput Editor - Add bidirectional Markdown ↔ Story conversion with mode toggle

userStories.title: Implement storyToMarkdown for inline types
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to convert Story inline content to Markdown syntax.
acceptanceCriteria: Handle nested inlines recursively (e.g., bold within italic)
Unit tests for each inline type conversion
userStories.notes: Foundation for Story → Markdown. See packages/shared/src/urbit/content.ts for Inline types.

userStories.title: Implement storyToMarkdown for block types
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to convert Story block content to Markdown syntax.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `blockToMarkdown(block: Block): string` function to storyToMarkdown.ts
Convert Header → `#`-`######` based on tag level
Convert Code → fenced code block with language
Handle nested lists with proper indentation
Unit tests for each block type conversion

userStories.title: Implement full storyToMarkdown function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to convert a complete Story to Markdown.
acceptanceCriteria: Iterate through Verse[] and dispatch to inlinesToMarkdown or blockToMarkdown
VerseInline content joined with proper paragraph breaks
VerseBlock content rendered with appropriate spacing
Unit tests for mixed inline/block stories
userStories.notes: Combines US-001 and US-002 into complete Story conversion

userStories.title: Add markdown-it parser dependency
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Markdown parser to convert Markdown to Story format.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `markdown-it-task-lists` plugin for task list support
Verify package installs successfully with pnpm
userStories.notes: markdown-it chosen for good AST access and plugin ecosystem

userStories.title: Implement markdownToStory for inline tokens
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to parse Markdown inline tokens to Story Inline types.
acceptanceCriteria: Detect `~ship-name` pattern in text and convert to Ship
Unit tests for each inline token type

userStories.title: Implement markdownToStory for block tokens
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to parse Markdown block tokens to Story Block/Verse types.
acceptanceCriteria: Map heading → Header with correct tag level
Map fence → Code block with lang
Map task list items → List (tasklist) with checked state
Map blockquote → VerseInline with Blockquote wrapper
Unit tests for each block token type

userStories.title: Implement full markdownToStory function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to convert complete Markdown text to Story format.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert token stream to Verse[] array
Unit tests for full document conversion

userStories.title: Add round-trip conversion tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify Markdown ↔ Story conversion preserves content.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: Markdown → Story → Markdown produces equivalent output
Test: Story → Markdown → Story produces equivalent structure
Test coverage for: paragraphs, headers, lists, code blocks, images, inline formatting
Document any known lossy conversions in comments
userStories.notes: Some loss is acceptable (e.g., Cite blocks) but must be documented

userStories.title: Add Markdown mode toggle button to BigInput toolbar
userStories.description: As a user, I want to toggle between rich text and Markdown modes.
acceptanceCriteria: Add toggle button to InputToolbar in BigInput
Use appropriate icon (code brackets or Markdown symbol)
Toggle button shows active state when in Markdown mode
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement Markdown editor textarea
userStories.description: As a user, I want to edit raw Markdown in a plain text editor.
acceptanceCriteria: Full-width textarea that expands with content
Pass value and onChange props for controlled input
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Integrate Markdown editor into BigInput
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the Markdown editor when Markdown mode is active.
acceptanceCriteria: Conditionally render MarkdownEditor or MessageInput based on isMarkdownMode
Add `markdownContent` state to track raw Markdown text
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Convert content when switching to Markdown mode
userStories.description: As a user, I want my rich text content converted to Markdown when I switch modes.
acceptanceCriteria: When toggling to Markdown mode, get current Tiptap content as inlines
Call storyToMarkdown to convert to Markdown string
Handle conversion errors with user-friendly toast/alert
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Convert content when switching to rich text mode
userStories.description: As a user, I want my Markdown content converted to rich text when I switch modes.
acceptanceCriteria: When toggling to rich text mode, read markdownContent state
Call markdownToStory to convert to Story
Update Tiptap editor with converted content
Handle conversion errors with user-friendly toast/alert
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: May need to convert Story back to Tiptap JSON format

userStories.title: Handle send/save from Markdown mode
userStories.description: As a user, I want to save my post when editing in Markdown mode.
acceptanceCriteria: If Markdown mode, convert markdownContent to Story before sending
Existing sendPostFromDraft flow receives Story as normal
Title and header image handled independently (existing behavior)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Load existing post content in Markdown mode
userStories.description: As a user, I want to edit existing posts in Markdown mode.
acceptanceCriteria: When editing a post (editingPost prop), convert content to Markdown if isMarkdownMode
Handle posts with no content gracefully
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Tiptap input rules for on-the-fly Markdown shortcuts
userStories.description: As a user typing in rich text mode, I want Markdown shortcuts to auto-convert.
acceptanceCriteria: Add input rule: `` `text` `` + space → inline code
Add input rule: `# ` at line start → H1 (## → H2, etc.)
Add input rule: `- ` at line start → bullet list
Add input rule: `1. ` at line start → numbered list
Add input rule: `> ` at line start → blockquote
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Tiptap extensions already include these input rules. Verified via tests and documentation in packages/editor/src/markdownInputRules.md
